title: Polish Fried Clams with Crispy Rice
description: A European-inspired seafood dish featuring clams fried in a crispy rice coating, a perfect meal for a cold evening.

ingredients.name: clams
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, scrubbed and rinsed

instructions: Rinse the clams and scrub them under cold water. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine 1 cup of crispy rice coating and 1/2 cup of uncooked white rice.
Add 1 tablespoon of smoked paprika and mix well.
Heat 2 tablespoons of fatty in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the clams to the skillet and sprinkle with the crispy rice mixture.
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the rice is golden brown and the clams are cooked through.
Serve hot with spicy sauce (monsoon) on the side (optional).
